rulings.Case Title: KATHERINE S LOH ET AL VS. POLYMATHIC PROPERTIES, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT POLYMATHIC PROPERTIES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Or Summary Adjudication Hearing Required to address the statute of limitations and May 29, 2014 e-mail exchange. Each side to prepare a proposed order in conformity with CCP 437c(g) (portions of the proposed order referencing facts and evidence re: SOL shall be underlined) and present a copy by 9:15 a.m. on January 16, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WEISBERG & MILLER VS. HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC, ELLIOT ZEMEL, HIMEL CAPITAL LLC Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination is continued to February 19, 2020 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply no later than January 31, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ZEHNER ET AL VS. DAVID VAN DER VOORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 16, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID VAN DER VOORT, TOMMI WEST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges all causes of action as in not barred by SOL based on the allegations on the face of the complaint. =(501/CFH)
